response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:10: Talk segment by FWMC. 2. 03:10: Song performance begins. Visual OCR identifies 'Like! Like! Like!', lyrics by Chobito, and music by 10YA. 3. Searched for 'Like! Like! Like! 10YA ちょびと lyrics', but authoritative full lyrics were not found online. Lyrics provided are transcribed from the video's on-screen display.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Fuwawa and Mococo (FWMC) giving an introductory talk followed by a live performance of the song 'Like! Like! Like!' featuring Mori Calliope.

scenes.description: Fuwawa and Mococo (FWMC) welcome the audience and give an introductory talk before the performance.
The song 'Like! Like! Like!' is performed live by Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and Mori Calliope. Lyrics and music credits are displayed on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Mori Calliope
